account.description: The Account Settings provides a centralized vue to manage personal information, access cabinet, and oversee linked bank accounts.

system.description: The System Settings page provides a centralized interface for administrators to configure and manage essential system settings.

user_management.description: Manage user accounts, roles, and permissions effortlessly to ensure secure and efficient access control.

cabinet.title: Company Settings
cabinet.description: Manage the information, preferences, and visual assets used by your company.

bank_account.title: Treasury Accounts
bank_account.description: Manage your cash and bank accounts, then track their balance in real time from one place.

deposit_dialog.title: Deposit {{type}} {{reference}}
deposit_dialog.description: Select the bank account where this instrument will be deposited
deposit_dialog.empty_bank_accounts: No bank account is available to deposit this instrument.
deposit_dialog.empty_matching_bank_accounts: No bank account with the same currency as this instrument is available for deposit.
deposit_dialog.conversion_notice: The amount will be converted to {{amount}} using the rate {{rate}}.
deposit_dialog.missing_rate_notice: A valid exchange rate is required to deposit this instrument into a bank account with a different currency.

pay_dialog.title: Mark as Paid
pay_dialog.description: Are you sure you want to mark {{type}} {{reference}} as paid (collected) into {{account}}?
pay_dialog.due_date_notice: The due date is {{dueDate}}. You can still record this payment right away if needed.
pay_dialog.currency_mismatch_notice: The deposited bank account does not use the same currency as this instrument. Cancel the deposit and choose a bank account with the same currency before marking it as paid.
pay_dialog.conversion_notice: This payment will be recorded as {{amount}} in this bank account using the rate {{rate}}.
pay_dialog.missing_rate_notice: A valid exchange rate is required to mark this instrument as paid in a bank account with a different currency.

reject_dialog.title: Mark as Rejected
reject_dialog.description: Are you sure you want to mark {{type}} {{reference}} as failed? This action cannot be undone.

cancel_deposit_dialog.title: Cancel Deposit
cancel_deposit_dialog.description_deposited: Are you sure you want to cancel the deposit for {{type}} {{reference}}? This will move it back to pending.
cancel_deposit_dialog.description_paid: Are you sure you want to cancel the deposit for {{type}} {{reference}}? This will reverse the related bank collection and move it back to pending.

roles.description: Define and assign roles to streamline permissions and access control for users.

hints.create_dialog_hint: Enter the details to create a new role. Make sure all the required fields are filled before saving.
hints.update_dialog_hint: Enter the details to update the role. Make sure all the required fields are filled before saving.
hints.delete_dialog_hint: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. All associations with this role will also be removed.
hints.duplicate_dialog_hint: This action will duplicate the role, including all its associations. You can undo this action later if needed.

permissions.description: Set and manage permissions to control access to features and resources securely and efficiently.
